summary: Iteration 68 - Global Analysis and Fixes Testing Complete. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: 1) Login bielaghana@gmail.com/474Treckadzo works and returns cooperative type with coop_code (COOP-ERA-003). 2) Login klenakan.eric@gmail.com/474Treckadzo works and returns admin type. 3) Login coop-test@greenlink.ci/474Treckadzo works and returns cooperative type. 4) POST /api/auth/register for cooperative auto-generates coop_code in COOP-XXX-NNN format. 5) POST /api/auth/register for acheteur (phone only) works without errors. 6) GET /api/admin/analytics/onboarding returns summary with cooperatives (23), agents (12), producteurs (36) counts. 7) GET /api/admin/analytics/onboarding returns funnel array with 6 steps. 8) GET /api/admin/analytics/onboarding returns cooperatives array with details (agents, members, parcels). 9) GET /api/auth/cooperatives public endpoint returns list of cooperatives with code and name. 10) Frontend: Super Admin dashboard has 'Onboarding' tab. 11) Frontend: Onboarding tab shows 4 summary cards (Cooperatives, Agents terrain, Producteurs, Total utilisateurs). 12) Frontend: Onboarding tab shows funnel visualization with colored bars. 13) Frontend: Onboarding tab shows cooperatives breakdown table. 14) Frontend: /register page with cooperative type shows 'Nom de la cooperative' field.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: Login endpoint uses hashed_password field with self-healing for admin accounts
auth.py: generate_coop_code() creates COOP-{PREFIX}-{SEQUENCE} format using coop_code_counters collection
auth.py: register endpoint handles phone-only registration (email can be empty/null)
auth.py: GET /api/auth/cooperatives is public endpoint returning active cooperatives
admin_analytics.py: GET /api/admin/analytics/onboarding returns summary, funnel (6 steps), and cooperatives array
admin_analytics.py: Onboarding endpoint requires admin user_type (403 for non-admin)
OnboardingDashboard.jsx: Shows 4 summary cards (Cooperatives, Agents terrain, Producteurs, Total utilisateurs)
OnboardingDashboard.jsx: Shows funnel visualization with 6 colored bars
OnboardingDashboard.jsx: Shows cooperatives breakdown table with agents, members, parcels, verified counts
Register.jsx: Shows 'Nom de la cooperative' field when userType='cooperative' with auto-generation note
seed_data_creation: Test cooperative created during testing with auto-generated code (COOP-DAL-XXX format)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All global fixes verified: 1) Login works for all 3 test accounts (admin, 2 cooperatives). 2) Password field is 'hashed_password' with self-healing for admin accounts. 3) Cooperative registration auto-generates coop_code. 4) Acheteur phone-only registration works. 5) Onboarding dashboard fully functional with summary cards, funnel, and cooperatives table. 6) GET /api/auth/cooperatives is public. Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.
